sources_used: wikipedia - List of video games featuring Batman
extraction_notes: Batman Returns (Genesis) - The available Wikipedia source provides only game release dates, platforms, developer information (Acme Interactive), and gameplay mechanics. No musical data including tempo, keys, chord progressions, track names, areas, time signatures, modes, energy levels, or SFX characteristics are documented in the provided source material. The source only notes it is 'an action adventure game with large environments and power ups to collect such as a grappling gun to reach new areas.' Audio/music parameters cannot be extracted from this documentation tier.
